# CWE-425 positive: admin export without authorization (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-425-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

func ServeAdminExport(db *sql.DB) {
	http.HandleFunc("/internal/admin/export.csv", func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		rows, err := db.Query("SELECT email, ssn FROM customers")
		if err != nil {
			http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
			return
		}
		defer rows.Close()
		out := []map[string]string{}
		for rows.Next() {
			var email, ssn string
			_ = rows.Scan(&email, &ssn)
			out = append(out, map[string]string{"email": email, "ssn": ssn})
		}
		_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(out)
	})
}
